examples_json: [{"en":"I always have breakfast.","zh":"我总是吃早餐。"}]

column9: [{"en":"Before I sleep I read a book.","zh":"睡觉前我读一本书。"}]
[{"en":"After I eat dinner I watch TV.","zh":"吃完晚饭后我看电视。"}]
[{"en":"While I was cooking I listened to music.","zh":"我做饭时听音乐。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"The cat is on the sofa.","zh":"猫在沙发上。"}]
[{"en":"The bank is next to the hotel.","zh":"银行在酒店旁边。"}]

[{"en":"Turn left at the traffic lights.","zh":"在红绿灯处左转。"}]
[{"en":"It's opposite the supermarket.","zh":"它在超市对面。"}]
